creator: empty.japan
caption:
Even though certain areas of Kyoto remain extremely overcrowded, the real magic of Kyoto and neighboring prefectures is still waiting to be discovered by most visitors.

Charming towns, stunning landscapes, and authentic experiences - enjoy all of this like a local with my insider tips and Secrets of Kansai itinerary.

📍All locations in my itineraries are easily accessible by public transport and suitable for all seasons.
